summary: Admin User Reset Verification feature fully tested. Backend: All 12 API tests passed (reset-verification, users/list, users/{id}). Frontend: All UI components working - Verified column displays correctly with 'Verified', 'Pending', 'Legacy' statuses; Reset Verify buttons appear for appropriate users; Reset Verification modal opens and contains all expected elements.

issues: Minor: React hydration warning in console (span in tbody) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

tests: Requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
Returns 404 for non-existent user
Validates reason field minimum length (422 for short reason)
Successfully resets user: sets credits=0, pending_credits=20, emailVerified=false, credits_locked=true
Returns 200 with users array
Contains pagination information
Users have emailVerified, pending_credits, credits_locked fields
Supports role filter and search parameters
Returns 200 with user details for valid user
Returns 404 for non-existent user
Page loads at /app/admin/users
Table has Verified column header
Verification status badges display (Verified=green, Pending=amber, Legacy=gray)
Reset Verify buttons appear for users with credits who are not verified or legacy
Modal opens when clicking Reset Verify button
Contains warning banner with bullet points
Shows current user status (credits, verified)
Has reason input field with default value
Has Cancel and Reset Verification buttons
data-testid attributes are properly set

critical_code_review_comments: Reset verification endpoint properly resets user to pending verification state
Audit logging is implemented for verification resets
Credit ledger records the reset transaction
UI correctly shows verification status with color-coded badges
Modal has clear warning about what the action will do
seed_data_creation: None - used existing users in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin User Reset Verification feature is fully functional. Backend POST /api/admin/users/reset-verification endpoint resets user verification status (sets credits=0, pending_credits=20, emailVerified=false, credits_locked=true). Frontend UI at /app/admin/users shows Verified column with status badges and Reset Verify buttons. Modal opens correctly and contains all expected elements. One minor React hydration warning in console about span in tbody - cosmetic issue only.
